programme.title: Boston Blue
programme.desc: When a captured serial killer hints at the whereabouts of a missing child, Danny teams up with a familiar ally in a tense race against time; health scares and long-kept family secrets surface, forcing members of the team to confront personal truths.

programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Lucky Dog: Reunions
programme.desc: An energetic 2-year-old boxer must learn to focus before it can become the perfect playmate for three active young boys.

programme.title: Lucky Dog: Down Under
programme.desc: A mom who grew up afraid of dogs might be willing to open her heart to a friendly pug-French bulldog mix named Banjo; a family hopes that a gentle Great Dane-wolfhound mix named Evie will bring comfort and emotional support to their lives.

programme.title: Mission Unstoppable
programme.sub-title: Conserving Artwork, Catalase Enzymes, and Counting Seconds
programme.desc: The science and technology used to conserve paintings; why time flies when one is having fun; a bioengineer teaches about enzymes; how child life specialists help sick kids in hospitals feel better through the power of play.

programme.title: Live: PPA Tour Pickleball
programme.desc: From Peachtree Corners, Ga.

programme.title: Unscripted
programme.desc: Inside the ropes at the RBC Heritage with Kurt Kitayama, one of professional golf's rising stars. Go behind the scenes as the two-time PGA TOUR winner prepares for the week, navigates the pressure of competition, and dives into his journey so far.

programme.title: Live: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: The third round of the PGA Tour signature event gets underway at Trump National Doral in Miami. Golfers face the grueling 7,600-yard Blue Monster layout as they jockey for position to earn a massive slice of the eight-figure financial reward.

programme.title: Live: LPGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: A champion is crowned at the LPGA Riviera Maya Open at Mayakoba. Chizzy Awai claimed the title and $375,000 by winning last year's event at Playa del Carmen, Mexico.

programme.title: Live: PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: A champion is crowned following the final round of the PGA Tour signature event in Miami. The field must survive the daunting par-4 18th hole at Trump National Doral to secure the prestigious title and claim a lucrative multimillion-dollar payout.

programme.title: CBS Evening News
programme.desc: Tony Dokoupil shares the day's most important stories, delivering context and depth to bring greater understanding to one's world.

programme.title: CBS News New York
programme.desc: Stay informed with the latest breaking news and headlines.

programme.title: 60 Minutes
programme.desc: The oldest and most-watched newsmagazine on television gets the real story on America's most prevalent issues. CBS News correspondents contribute segments to each hourlong episode. Topics range from hard news coverage to politics, lifestyle, pop culture, business, health, and science. The correspondents and contributors include Sharyn Alfonsi, Anderson Cooper, Steve Kroft, Lara Logan, Norah O'Donnell, Scott Pelley, Charlie Rose, Lesley Stahl, Jon Wertheim, Oprah Winfrey and Bill Whitaker.

programme.title: Marshals
programme.desc: After a prison bus crash, two Marshals face ghosts from the past when the team splits up to hunt down the escapees and triage the injured.

programme.title: Tracker
programme.desc: Reenie hires Colter to locate the star witness of her and Maxine's lawsuit against a corrupt real estate developer on the eve of trial.

programme.desc: A seemingly random murder outside UHOP sets the stage for the arrival of someone from Watson and Sherlock Holmes' past.
